greeting: Welcome to Alta Vista Pet! I'm the virtual receptionist. How can we help your furry family member today?

faq.a: Yes! Call us at (602) 482-0204 to schedule your grooming visit.
Yes! We offer both pet boarding and grooming services under one roof.
Most grooming sessions are 1.5-2 hours depending on breed and coat condition.
We're in Phoenix, Arizona. Call us for our exact location and directions.
We offer both dog and cat grooming services. Call to confirm availability for your cat.

faq.q: Can I board my pets while they're being groomed?
faq.a: Yes! We offer the convenience of boarding and grooming at the same facility.

faq.q: What size dogs do you work with?
faq.a: All sizes! With 229+ reviews at 4.4 stars, we're experienced with dogs from chihuahuas to great danes.

escalation: Great question! Let me have a team member get back to you. Call us at (602) 482-0204.
